---
name: Dataset contribution
about: Contribute sample questions or improve dataset examples
title: "[Dataset] "
labels: dataset, good first issue
assignees: ''
---

## Subject

Example: Mathematics, Science, English, Indonesian Language.

## Topic

Example: Linear Functions, Geometry, Algebra.

## Number of questions

How many questions do you want to add or improve?

## Dataset format

- [ ] CSV
- [ ] JSON
- [ ] Both

## Checklist

- [ ] The questions follow the current dataset format.
- [ ] Each question has an answer key.
- [ ] Each question has an explanation.
- [ ] Each question has topic and difficulty metadata.
- [ ] The content is allowed to be shared.

## Additional notes

Add any additional context here.
